3. SATURN-SUN-MERCURY-MOON-MARS YOGA.
Should these be conjunct at birth, the native will be short lived, imprisoned and be devoid of every
kind of happiness, wife, sons and money.
4. MARS-MOON-JUPITER-VENUS-SUN YOGA.
Should these five planets join at birth, the native will be blind by birth, subjected to much grief, be
devoid of parents, always dejected in mood and fond of singing.
5. SATURN-MOON-MARS-JUPITER-SUN YOGA.
If there be a combination of these planets in one House, the native will be all expert warrior, will
steal others money, give trouble to others, be a tale-bearer and fickle-minded.
6. SUN-MOON-VENUS-SATURN-MARS YOGA.
Should the said five planets join in one House, the native will be devoid of respect, money and
prosperity, will have dirty conduct and be addicted to women.
7. MERCURY-MOON-JUPITER-SUN-SATURN YOGA.
One with the conjunction of these planets will be a machinist, will enjoy great prosperity, be a
kings minister, be a judge and be famous.
